ddls:
CREATE TABLE "vehicles" (
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle */,
  "make" TEXT /* Make of the vehicle (e.g., ALFA ROMEO) */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the vehicle (e.g., 145) */,
  "year_of_birth" INTEGER /* Year of manufacture of the vehicle */,
  "vehicle_type" TEXT /* Type of vehicle (e.g., car, truck, motorcycle) */,
  "engine_size" REAL /* Engine size of the vehicle (in liters) */,
  "transmission_type" TEXT /* Transmission type of the vehicle (e.g., manual, automatic) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inspections" (
  "inspection_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inspection */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle being inspected */,
  "inspection_date" TEXT /* Date of the inspection */,
  "total_defects" INTEGER /* Total number of defects found during the inspection */,
  "pass" INTEGER /* Number of vehicles that passed the inspection */,
  "fail" INTEGER /* Number of vehicles that failed the inspection */,
  "inspection_center_id" INTEGER /* ID of the inspection center where the inspection took place */,
  "inspector_id" INTEGER /* ID of the inspector who conducted the inspection */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inspection_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inspections_inspector_id FOREIGN KEY ("inspector_id") REFERENCES inspectors ("inspector_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inspections_inspection_center_id FOREIGN KEY ("inspection_center_id") REFERENCES inspection_centers ("center_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inspections_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inspection_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category (e.g., Vehicle and Safety Equipment) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "defects" (
  "defect_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each defect */,
  "inspection_id" INTEGER /* ID of the inspection where the defect was found */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category the defect belongs to */,
  "defect_count" INTEGER /* Number of defects found */,
  "defect_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of vehicles with the defect */,
  "defect_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the defect */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("defect_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_defects_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES inspection_categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_defects_inspection_id FOREIGN KEY ("inspection_id") REFERENCES inspections ("inspection_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inspectors" (
  "inspector_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inspector */,
  "inspector_name" TEXT /* Full name of the inspector */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the inspector */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the inspector (e.g., inspector, administrator, analyst) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the inspector's account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inspector_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inspectors_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "inspection_centers" (
  "center_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inspection center */,
  "center_name" TEXT /* Name of the inspection center */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the inspection center */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the inspection center */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the inspection center */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("center_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inspection_outcomes" (
  "outcome_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each outcome */,
  "inspection_id" INTEGER /* ID of the inspection */,
  "outcome_date" TEXT /* Date of the outcome */,
  "outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the inspection (e.g., pass, fail) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes regarding the outcome */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("outcome_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inspection_outcomes_inspection_id FOREIGN KEY ("inspection_id") REFERENCES inspections ("inspection_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_defect_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history entry */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle */,
  "defect_id" INTEGER /* ID of the defect */,
  "inspection_date" TEXT /* Date of the inspection */,
  "outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the inspection */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_defect_history_defect_id FOREIGN KEY ("defect_id") REFERENCES defects ("defect_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_defect_history_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inspector_roles" (
  "inspector_id" INTEGER /* ID of the inspector */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the role */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inspector_id", "role_id")
)
